rulings.Case Title: DAVID LO et al VS. DANIEL S LEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Allowing Filing Of Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 18, 2017 line 1. PLAINTIFF DAVID LO, DANIEL LO, and ALICE LO's Motion For Order Allowing Filing Of Second Amended Complaint GRANTED. Trial date is vacated and the case is set back to Case Management Calendar. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARYELLEN RYAN VS. REBECKA KIM ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alternatively, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 18, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT REBECKA KIM and ASHLEY MCRAE's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or Alternatively, Summary Adjudication Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Moving party fails to shift burden as to the scope and duration of work for which Plaintiff's permission was obtained, in the alternative, there is a triable issue of fact regarding the scope and duration of the work. See Plaintiff's Declaration paragraph 4 and McRae Declaration paragraph 9.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LISA J. BAILLY-SOLWAY ET AL VS. HILARY C. PIERCE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Cross-Defendant Sean Solways Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Against Hilary C. Pierces First Amended Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, January 18, 2017 line 3. CROSS DEFENDANT SEAN SOLWAY's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings Against Hilary C. Pierces First Amended Cross-Complaint GRANTED with leave to amend for cross-complaint to allege fact that the representations regarding exclusive use were false at the time they were made and that agent knew about such falsity. = (501/REQ)
